title: Spicy Canadian Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy Canadian wrap filled with crispy chicken, crunchy pistachios, and fresh cilantro.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a large bowl, whisk together the zesty hummus, spicy sauce, and chopped cilantro.
Add the shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, and pistachios to the bowl and toss to combine.
Warm the Canadian wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by slicing the grilled chicken and adding it to the bottom half of the wrap.
Spoon the hummus mixture on top of the chicken, followed by the lettuce-tomato-pistachio mixture.
Top with the top half of the wrap and serve immediately.
Note: You can also add some sliced red onion, diced bell peppers, or crumbled feta cheese to the wrap for extra flavor.
